c8a6f6b0-3baf-4cf4-8b7a-25ea19f7d18c.name: pi_age_range
c8a6f6b0-3baf-4cf4-8b7a-25ea19f7d18c.constraint: context Personal_Information inv age_range: self.age >= 0 and self.age <= 120

c0f6ce3d-9f43-4fd3-b214-efc97d36216c.name: education_required_fields
c0f6ce3d-9f43-4fd3-b214-efc97d36216c.constraint: context Education inv required_degree_fields: self.degreeName <> '' and self.providedBy <> ''
